and computation. This pattern is called

example of this is retrieval augmented
generation or
rag. The big advantage here is

needs one of these tools to answer a

what information to pass to it. This

second main paradigm, the agent. Instead

The LLM gets a task, calls a tool, feeds

this flexibility often leads to lower
